passive.name: Dreamland Twist
passive.description:
Lunox is twisted by the powers of Chaos and Order.
When Lunox uses Power of Order, she gains 0.5% of Spell Vamp for every 1% of Magic Penetration.
When Lunox uses Power of Chaos, she gains 0.5% of Magic Penetration for every 1% of Spell Vamp.

skill1.name: Starlight Pulse
skill1.description:
Lunox summons a rain of starlight upon nearby enemies, dealing 200 (+110% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage. The starlight then returns to Lunox, each restoring 75 (+30% Total Magic Power) HP to her. The HP restored is doubled when hitting enemy heroes.
This skill shares cooldown with Chaos Assault. Grants one stack of Power of Order after use and ends the Power of Chaos enhanced state.
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=30/35/40/45/50/55
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=200/230/260/290/320/350
|stats3=HP Regen|stats3_value=75/80/85/90/95/100

skill2.name: Chaos Assault
skill2.description:
Lunox unleashes Chaos Energy at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage equal to 250 (+120% Total Magic Power) plus 2.5% of target's Max HP (1.5% of Max HP against Creeps).
While enhanced by Power of Chaos, this skill has a brief cooldown and its cast interval is unaffected by Cooldown Reduction.
|stats1=Base Damage|stats1_value=250/270/290/310/330/350
|stats2=Extra Percentage Damage|stats2_value=2.5%/3%/3.5%/4%/4.5%/5%
|stats3=Damage to Creeps|stats3_value=1.5%/1.8%/2.1%/2.4%/2.7%/3%

ultimate.name: Cosmic Fission
ultimate.description:
When Lunox uses the power of Order and Chaos, she will deal 300 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the targets along the way and slowing them by 40% for 2s.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=10.0/9.5/9.0/8.5/8.0/7.5
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=70/80/90/100/110/120
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=300/340/380/420/460/500

extra1.name: Order & Chaos
extra1.description:
Lunox is twisted by the powers of Chaos and Order.
When Lunox uses Power of Order, she gains Brilliance and becomes invincible while dealing continuous damage to nearby enemies.
When Lunox uses Power of Chaos, she gains Darkening and can blink in a target direction and greatly reduces the cooldown of Chaos Assault for a brief period.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=30.0/26.0/22.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=120/160/200

extra2.name: Power of Order: Brilliance
extra2.description:
Lunox extends the Light Barrier, becomes invincible for 2.5s, and gains 30% extra Movement Speed while dealing 100 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.5s to nearby enemies.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=30.0/26.0/22.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=120/160/200
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=100/120/140

extra3.name: Power of Chaos: Darkening
extra3.description:
Lunox blinks in the target direction, dealing 250 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies, slowing them by 30% for 4s.
For the next 4s, Lunox enhances her Power of Chaos to greatly reduce the cooldown of Chaos Assault (unaffected by CD Reduction), but using Starlight Pulse will end this enhanced state.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=30.0/26.0/22.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=120/160/200
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=250/350/450
